text: Inline trivial action wrappers into list-store.ts
description:
Review action files and inline simple 1-5 line wrappers directly into list-store.ts.

Keep separate (complex logic):
- move-actions.ts (738 lines - complex reordering/API calls)
- keyboard-actions.ts (396 lines - event handling logic)
- selection-actions.ts (247 lines - path calculation)
- navigation-actions.ts (184 lines - traversal logic)

Inline candidates (if trivial):
- aim-actions.ts (178 lines - check if just wrappers)
- phase-actions.ts (83 lines - likely simple)

Goal: Reduce indirection, keep list-store.ts under 500 lines

status.comment:
Analysis complete: NO trivial wrappers found. All action files contain substantial business logic:
- aim-actions.ts: 178 lines (complex creation with path handling)
- phase-actions.ts: 83 lines (recursive selection logic)
- move-actions.ts: 738 lines (complex reordering + API)
- keyboard-actions.ts: 396 lines (event handling)
- selection-actions.ts: 247 lines (path calculation)
- navigation-actions.ts: 184 lines (traversal)

The thin delegators in list-store.ts provide value by maintaining stable API and encapsulating dependencies. Current architecture is sound.
